src: instahack is a bash & python based script which is officially made to test password strength of Instagram account from termux and kali  with bruteforce attack and. it based on tor This tool works on both rooted Android device and Non-rooted Android device. Best Tool For Instagram Bruteforce hacking Tool By Waseem Akram.
ja: instahackはTermuxおよびKaliでInstagramアカウントのパスワード強度をTorベースのブルートフォース攻撃でテストするbash・Pythonスクリプト。ルート済み・非ルートAndroid端末の両方で動作。
